cards.front: What is a First Order Linear Recurrence Relation?
cards.back: A mathematical equation where each term is defined recursively as a linear combination of previous terms

cards.front: What is the general form of a First Order Linear Recurrence Relation?
What is the solution to a First Order Linear Recurrence Relation using the characteristic equation method?
cards.back: The solution is given by the sum of the roots of the characteristic equation, multiplied by the initial condition

cards.front: What is the characteristic equation of a First Order Linear Recurrence Relation?
cards.back: a characteristic polynomial obtained by substituting n with x in the recurrence relation

cards.front: What is the homogeneous part of a First Order Linear Recurrence Relation?
cards.back: A recurrence relation where the right-hand side is zero, usually obtained by removing the non-homogeneous term
